---
title: "spatial_autocorr"
output: html_document
date: "2025-10-28"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(SpatialFeatureExperiment)
  library(SFEData)
  library(scater)
})
library(ggplot2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ExperimentHub)
library(SpatialExperiment)
library(spdep)
```

#Moran's I, global and bivariate
```{r}

load("~/subset_list.RData")

features <- c("Cdkn1a", "Cdkn2a", "Trp53", "Myog", "Myf5")

results_list <- lapply(names(subset_list), function(sample_name) {
  spe <- subset_list[[sample_name]]
  message("Processing sample: ", sample_name)
  
  sfe <- SpatialFeatureExperiment(
    assays = assays(spe),
    colData = colData(spe),
    spatialCoords = spatialCoords(spe)
  )
  
  # prova a costruire il grafo con protezione dagli errori
  g <- tryCatch({
    findVisiumGraph(sfe, zero.policy = TRUE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("⚠️  Skipping sample '", sample_name, "' due to error: ", e$message)
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(g)) return(NULL)
  
  # controlla punti isolati
  isolated <- which(card(g$neighbours) == 0)
  
  if (length(isolated) > 0) {
    message("   → Found ", length(isolated), " isolated spots. Removing them...")
    sfe <- sfe[, -isolated]
    
    g <- tryCatch({
      findVisiumGraph(sfe, zero.policy = TRUE)
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("   ⚠️  Sample '", sample_name, "' still problematic after removal. Skipping.")
      return(NULL)
    })
  }
  
  if (is.null(g)) return(NULL)
  
  colGraph(sfe, "visium") <- g
  message("✅  Sample '", sample_name, "' processed successfully with ", ncol(sfe), " spots.")
  
  # --- Calcolo del Moran's I bivariato per i geni ---
  moran_values <- numeric(length(features))
  names(moran_values) <- features
  
  for (i in seq_along(features)) {
    gene <- features[i]
    
    mor <- tryCatch({
      moran_bv(
        x = logcounts(sfe)["Pax7", ],
        y = logcounts(sfe)[gene, ],
        listw = g,
        nsim = 499,
        scale = TRUE
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("   ⚠️  Moran failed for gene ", gene, ": ", e$message)
      return(NULL)
    })
    
    moran_values[i] <- if (!is.null(mor)) mor$t0 else NA
  }
  
  # ritorna solo i valori del Moran
  return(data.frame(
    sample = sample_name,
    gene = features,
    moran = moran_values
  ))
})


results_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), results_list)
moran_results <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
moran_results
```

#Moran for FAPs, trim and myo markers
#ho provato anche a tenere solo gli spot senza myh4 ma non funzia
```{r}
load("~/subset_list.RData")
faps_genes <- c("Pdgfra","Ly6a","Dcn")
trim63 <- "Trim63"
load("~/subset_list.RData")

c26_list <- subset_list[names(subset_list) %in% c("c26_b2","c26_b4","c26_b6")]

results_list <- lapply(names(c26_list), function(sample_name) {
  spe <- c26_list[[sample_name]]
  message("Processing sample: ", sample_name)
  
  sfe <- SpatialFeatureExperiment(
    assays = assays(spe),
    colData = colData(spe),
    spatialCoords = spatialCoords(spe)
  )
  
  # prova a costruire il grafo con protezione dagli errori
  g <- tryCatch({
    findVisiumGraph(sfe, zero.policy = TRUE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("⚠️  Skipping sample '", sample_name, "' due to error: ", e$message)
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(g)) return(NULL)
  
  # controlla punti isolati
  isolated <- which(card(g$neighbours) == 0)
  
  if (length(isolated) > 0) {
    message("   → Found ", length(isolated), " isolated spots. Removing them...")
    sfe <- sfe[, -isolated]
    
    g <- tryCatch({
      findVisiumGraph(sfe, zero.policy = TRUE)
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("   ⚠️  Sample '", sample_name, "' still problematic after removal. Skipping.")
      return(NULL)
    })
  }
  
  if (is.null(g)) return(NULL)
  
  colGraph(sfe, "visium") <- g
  message("✅  Sample '", sample_name, "' processed successfully with ", ncol(sfe), " spots.")
  
  # --- Calcolo del Moran's I bivariato per i geni ---
  moran_values <- numeric(length(faps_genes))
  names(moran_values) <- faps_genes
  
  for (i in seq_along(faps_genes)) {
    gene <- faps_genes[i]
    
    mor <- tryCatch({
      moran_bv(
        x = logcounts(sfe)[trim63, ],
        y = logcounts(sfe)[gene, ],
        listw = g,
        nsim = 499,
        scale = TRUE
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("   ⚠️  Moran failed for gene ", gene, ": ", e$message)
      return(NULL)
    })
    
    moran_values[i] <- if (!is.null(mor)) mor$t0 else NA
  }
  
  # ritorna solo i valori del Moran
  return(data.frame(
    sample = sample_name,
    gene = faps_genes,
    moran = moran_values
  ))
})

#2 campioni su 3 non vanno, comunque direi che il segnale è chiaro

results_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), results_list)
moran_results <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
moran_results


```

#Moran locale e grafico co-espressione
?localmoran
in realtà non so quanto senso abbia perché è un'autocorrelazione
chiedi a Valerio
```{r}
spe <- subset_list$c26_b4
sfe <- SpatialFeatureExperiment(
  assays = assays(spe),
  colData = colData(spe),
  spatialCoords = spatialCoords(spe)
)

g <- findVisiumGraph(sfe, zero.policy = TRUE)

#devo costruire una variabile unica che rappresenta la relazione tra i 2 geni
faps_genes <- c("Pdgfra","Ly6a","Dcn")
#sarebbe meglio se mettessi assieme tutti i geni dei faps in qualche modo però perché erano espressi poco
mat_trim <- logcounts(spe["Trim63",])
mat_trim_num <- as.numeric(mat_trim)
mat_faps <- logcounts(spe["Pdgfra",])
mat_faps_num <- as.numeric(mat_faps)
x = terra::scale(mat_trim_num) * terra::scale(mat_faps_num)
x <- as.vector(x)
local_moran <- localmoran(x = x, listw = g)
#spe$moran <- terra::scale(local_moran[,1])
spe$moran <- local_moran[,1]
summary(spe$moran)

library(ggplot2)
library(ggspavis)
plotCoords(spe, annotate ="moran")

```
